entity.label: Bath-rabbim
entity.subtitle: Landmark
entity.description: Daughter of many, the name of one of the gates of the city of Heshbon, near which were pools (Cant. 7:4).

nodes.label: Bath-rabbim
nodes.description: Daughter of many, the name of one of the gates of the city of Heshbon, near which were pools (Cant. 7:4).

verses.text: Thy neck is as a tower of ivory; thine eyes like the fishpools in Heshbon, by the gate of Bathrabbim: thy nose is as the tower of Lebanon which looketh toward Damascus.
